examples: Don't try to ignore your afternoon snack craving.
Escaping our craving for paper will be anything but an easy affair.
My impatience with the customs ritual indicated that Chloe, who I had not known existed a few hours ago, had already acquired the status of a craving.
For Noah, talk of the Icee game triggered a craving for the sweet, fizzy, frozen drink.
Africans are emerging from a subsistence economy and have a craving for consumer goods.
